escalate_immediately: ICM incidents where I am DRI
ignore: HR announcements unless action is required (any channel)
JIT approval notifications unless Rahul is mentioned or addressed directly (any channel — email, Teams, etc.)
All ICM incidents unless Rahul is mentioned, assigned, or on DRI

needs_reply_rules.description: Only flag an item as 'needs reply' if ALL of the following are true:
criteria: Rahul is directly addressed — @mentioned by name, asked a question in a 1:1 chat, or explicitly called out (e.g. 'Rahul, can you...')
The message asks Rahul to do something or answer a question
The message is NOT a broadcast, channel-wide ask (e.g. 'Anyone?'), or general FYI
needs_reply_rules.when_unsure: Do NOT flag as 'needs reply'. Surface as FYI at most.
